name: @aeoess/aps-remote-signer
description: OPTIONAL, ISOLATED. Remote signer adapters (AWS KMS, Azure Key Vault, Vault Transit, PKCS#11) over the APS Signer abstraction. The raw private key never materializes in process; each adapter reduces to a HandleSigner holding only a key handle plus backend callbacks. NOT imported by core. Cloud SDKs are optional and injected by the caller.
